title: Portable Aluminum Lifting Equipment | 1,100 to 22,000 lb | eme
description: Portable aluminum gantry cranes, davit cranes, and lifting beams. Built to North American codes. 10-year warranty. Available in every state and province.

hero.headline:
Lift Heavier.
Mobilize Lighter.
hero.subhead: Portable aluminum gantry and davit cranes from 1,100 to 22,000 lb capacity. Lightweight by design — 1-2 people and 2 wrenches for lower capacity setup, standard facility equipment for higher capacities, rolls while fully loaded. Designed to North American codes. Available to rent or own in every state and province.
hero.imageCaption: Product photography placeholder · 6600R or 11000R in industrial setting

coverageMap.headline: Available in Every State and Province.
coverageMap.sub: All capacities. All geographies. Across Canada and the United States.

productCards.title: Aluminum Gantry Cranes
productCards.line: Portable A-frame gantries from 1,100 to 22,000 lb capacity.

productCards.title: Aluminum Davit Cranes
productCards.line: One-person portable lifting for manholes, rooftops, confined spaces.

productCards.title: Eagle Beam
productCards.line: Aluminum lifting beams. Up to 87% lighter than steel at equivalent capacity.

productCards.title: Accessories
productCards.line: Grip Eye, split beams, cantilevers, pneumatic casters, transport frames.

industryCards.title: Mechanical Contracting & Construction
industryCards.line: HVAC installs, pharma build-outs, data-center construction, refinery turnarounds. No crane truck line item.

industryCards.title: Specialized Rigging & Equipment Moving
industryCards.line: High-capacity portable gantries for plant moves and heavy equipment positioning where traditional cranes can't fit.

industryCards.title: Water & Wastewater
industryCards.line: Pump pulls, digester service, manhole work. Davit cranes and Grip Eye for index-free lifting.

industryCards.title: Helicopter Maintenance
industryCards.line: Engine lifts, transmission swaps, rotor head work in hangars and on the flightline.

industryCards.title: Trucking & Transportation
industryCards.line: Terminal fleet maintenance, shop floor lifts, portable on-trailer rigging.

industryCards.title: Industrial Maintenance
industryCards.line: Plant maintenance, facility work, motor and pump swaps, tight-space lifts.

industryCards.title: Data Centers & Semiconductor Fab
industryCards.line: Switchgear placement, server-row lifts, cleanroom-compatible portable rigging.

industryCards.title: Rooftop & In-Building Lifting
industryCards.line: HVAC rooftop placements, mechanical-penthouse equipment, indoor lifts with no crane-truck access.

showcase.label: Built for the Field
showcase.headline: Engineered in Canada. Proven on Five Continents.
showcase.body: From rooftop HVAC installs in Toronto to pump pulls in Phoenix wastewater plants to helicopter engine lifts in Calgary hangars — eme gantries show up where the work is. Certified. Field-tested. Standing by.

finalCta.headline: Ready to lift lighter?
finalCta.sub: Tell us your capacity, lift height, and industry. We'll respond within one business day with a quote or a nearby rental partner.
